visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with tied-back black hair wearing a grey sleeveless top stands smiling, holding a white smartphone in her left hand and gesturing with her right. A cat emoji with sunglasses is overlaid on her chest. The background is a bright studio or event space with light teal accents. (2) Chronological sequence showing the back views of the Samsung Galaxy S25 in various colors including deep sea blue, ice blue, and dazzling grey. Each phone features a vertically aligned triple-camera module. (3) A split-screen displays all four standard colors of the S25 (misty green, ice blue, deep sea blue, dazzling grey). (4) The video transitions to the S25+ model, showcasing ice blue, dazzling grey, and misty green in close-up back views. (5) Comparative side-by-side shots of the S25 and S25+ models are shown to illustrate size differences. (6) Detailed shots of the S25 Ultra in titanium silver, titanium grey, and titanium blue. The back features a quad-camera setup with large lenses. (7) A split-screen displays the four titanium colors of the S25 Ultra. (8) Close-ups of the S25 and S25+ side-by-side in matching colors. (9) A full lineup of the S25 and S25+ models laid flat on a surface. (10) A full lineup of the S25 Ultra models laid flat on a surface. (11) A hand enters the frame, pointing at the 'Online Exclusive' S25 Ultra colors (Pink Gold, Titanium Green, Jet Black) displayed on transparent acrylic stands in a well-lit showroom. (12) The S25 and S25+ online exclusive 'Coral Red' models are showcased on stands.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: 3c有趣思tim哥. [Logo]: @3ctim. [Slogan]: Samsung Galaxy S25 S25+ S25 Ultra 全色開箱. (2) [Slogan]: S25 深海藍. (3) [Slogan]: S25 冰藍. (4) [Slogan]: S25 炫灰. (5) [Slogan]: S25 迷綠. [Slogan]: S25 冰藍. [Slogan]: S25 深海藍. [Slogan]: S25 炫灰. (6) [Slogan]: S25+ 冰藍. (7) [Slogan]: S25+ 炫灰. (8) [Slogan]: S25+ 迷綠. (9) [Slogan]: S25+ 迷綠. [Slogan]: S25+ 冰藍. [Slogan]: S25+ 深海藍. [Slogan]: S25+ 炫灰. (10) [Slogan]: S25 Ultra 鈦銀. (11) [Slogan]: S25 Ultra 鈦灰. (12) [Slogan]: S25 Ultra 鈦空藍. (13) [Slogan]: S25 Ultra 鈦灰. [Slogan]: S25 Ultra 鈦空藍. [Slogan]: S25 Ultra 鈦銀. [Slogan]: S25 Ultra 鈦黑. (14) [Slogan]: S25+ 冰藍. [Slogan]: S25 冰藍. (15) [Variety]: 網路限定色. [Subtitle]: 這是網路的限定色.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main character in intro, 1 male hand pointing to phones, 1-2 distant figures in the background of the showroom shots.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A female presenter with a bright smile wearing a grey outfit; later, a male narrator's hand is visible.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Initially a clean studio background with teal lines; later transitions to a tech launch event or showroom floor with product stands and other attendees in the distance.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo electronic pop music with a steady synthesized beat and a bright, energetic melody plays continuously. (2) Faint background room tone from a showroom is audible, including a distant crowd murmur. (3) A male narrator begins speaking in Mandarin around 0:59, maintaining a professional and enthusiastic tone. He describes specific colors like 'online exclusive', 'Jet Black', 'Blue Black', and 'Pink Gold'. (4) The narrator continues describing the 'Coral Red' online exclusive colors for the S25 and S25+ models until the end of the clip.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Demonstration -> Comparison -> Exclusive Features
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide a comprehensive visual overview of all color options available for the Samsung Galaxy S25, S25+, and S25 Ultra, including both standard retail colors and online-exclusive variations.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed showcasing of multiple Samsung smartphone models and their color variants.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses high-frequency cuts and split-screens to display a large amount of visual information about product aesthetics in a short time. The shift from studio graphics to live showroom footage adds authenticity.
